name: The Dufresne Group - DSG - ASHLEY HOMESTORES
message: The Dufresne Group (TDG) is a retailer of consumer goods. It offers furniture, appliances, home furnishings, and other products.  https://thedufresnegroup.ca https://dufresne.ca  Dufresne Spencer Group, LLC dba Ashley   Dufresne Furniture & Appliances  Furniture · Canada · 1,590 Employees    CEO MARK DUFRESNE  Mike Linton CFO & President, Shared Services & Dufresne Furniture & Appliances  Kevin Hook President, DSG Canada
